title: [MTR4] Red LHB Sleeper Coaches 1.0 - Indian Railways
description: Adds India's renowned LHB coaches to Minecraft with MTR mod.
body:
🚆 Red LHB Pack – Indian Railways Sleeper AC Coaches
-----------------------------------------------

Bring authentic Indian Railways LHB Red Coaches into Minecraft with this
high-detail passenger coach resource pack. Designed for realism and seamless
integration with MTR, this pack accurately represents long-distance express
and premium services used across India.

---
### ✨ Features:

- Highly detailed LHB coach models based on real Indian Railways specifications
- Includes the following coach variants:
  * AC First Class (1AC)
  * AC 2-Tier (2AC)
  * AC 3-Tier (3AC)
- Realistic Red LHB livery with accurate striping and markings
- Clean, high-resolution textures for windows, doors, underframe,
  and roof equipment
- Proper coach spacing and proportions for realistic train formations


### ⚠️ Warnings:
--------

- Uses .OBJ models, which may cause lag or stuttering on MTR4. Performance issues related to MTR’s rendering system are beyond our control
- Minor visual or texture alignment issues may exist — updates will refine these
- Designed for Indian Broad Gauge (1676 mm)
- Platforms higher than 1 block may visually clip with footsteps or underframe
- Works only on MTR4 i.e MTR 4.0.0 and above. Not suitable for MTR3
- **Use with [LHB EOG Generator Car Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/auYkWLzG) for completing the trainset due to open gangways.**

👉 Please report any bugs or visual glitches in our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/2bGWEmvjvZ) so we can address them in future updates.

### 📦 Requirements:
------------

- **[Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) Mod](https://modrinth.com/project/XKPAmI6u)** – Base Mod
- **[Indian Railways Resources](https://modrinth.com/project/id8qqQsh)** *(optional but recommended)* – ensures accurate alignment with the locomotive.
- **Highly recommended to use together with:**
  * [LHB EOG Generator Car Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/auYkWLzG) (Mandatory to complete the trainset)
  * [WAP-7 Locomotive Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/aj0bTZQi) (or any other Indian locomotive)

### 🛠️ Installation:
------------

1. Download the .zip file
2. Place it inside /.minecraft/resourcepacks/
3. Enable the pack in Minecraft
4. Look for coaches starting with “LHB” in the Depot list
